title: tilezz-rat-dafsa-blocks manifest
description: Block-index manifest for a tilezz-rat-dafsa-blocks asset directory. See blocks_schema.txt (alongside this file) for the full prose specification including the binary block file (`blocks/block_<NNNNNN>.bin`) wire format -- the JSON Schema here only covers the manifest JSON itself.

format.description: Wire-format discriminator; must be exactly this literal.

version.description: Manifest schema version. v1 = this schema.

block_format.description: Wire-format tag of each block file.

block_version.description: Block file format version, bumped independently of the manifest 'version'.

block_size.description: Number of DAFSA states per block (except the last block, which may be smaller).

n_states.description: Total DAFSA states across all blocks.

n_edges.description: Total DAFSA edges across all blocks.

n_sequences.description: Number of accepted sequences (rats). Equal to counts[root_state].

n_blocks.description: Number of block files. Equal to ceil(n_states / block_size).

root_state.description: DAFSA root state id. Always 0 in v1; recorded for clarity.

block_filename_template.description: printf-like template for block file paths. The '{:0N}' substitution is filled with the zero-padded block id. Default: 'blocks/block_{:06}.bin'.

max_indexed_length.description: Optional. Maximum length of any accepted sequence in this DAFSA. Allows clients to short-circuit out-of-range queries without walking the automaton. Absent in pre-v1.1 manifests; consumers should treat absence as 'unknown'.
